chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 697 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on MA No.6946/2023 (322 CrPC) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For hearing of main case 19.02.2024 Applicant Mushtaque Ali, present in person. Mr. Ghulam Rasool Chandio, Advocate for respondents No.3 & 4. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General along with ASI Muhammad Ramzan of Police Station Ahmedpur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This application is disposed of with consent of learned Deputy Prosecutor General, however, opposed by learned Counsel appearing for respondents No. 3 & 4, who has filed objections to the application today, in the terms whereby statement of applicant would be recorded by Duty Officer, Police Station Ahmedpur, and in case any cognizance offence is made out, he would act in terms of Section 154 CrPC, however, would not arrest any of the accused unless some tangible evidence is collected against them. Cr. Misc. App. is disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
